start.txt: I really should've locked the chest too...

choices.label: I need your help fixing my ship.
Why did you lock yourself away?

help.txt: You broke in my home to ask for help? Not exactly the best first impression.

help2.txt: *Sigh* Whatever... I guess I will if it'll get you to leave me alone.

why.txt: Those damn devils took everyone else, I didn't want to be next.

why2.txt: Anyways, I heard you talking to feather cheeks outside.

why3.txt: I suppose I can try to help you fix up your ship.

anyway.txt: But I'll need the correct parts to do so, and I dont have any lying around.

anyway2.txt: Collect 4 parts and I'll see what I can do.

anyway3.txt: You might find what you need in CryptTown, but I'd be careful if I were you. Last I heard, there was a flying devil loose in there.
